message: Self-training was attempted through a direct ALIGNN graphwise training loop. The ALIGNN 2026 CLI skipped graphwise training, DGL 2.1 was CPU-only, and CUDA DGL wheels 2.4.0+cu121 and 2.5.0+cu124 both hung inside the first ALIGNN forward pass with the installed PyTorch 2.8.0+cu128. The project therefore uses the completed RF/Ridge baseline results, with pretrained ALIGNN recorded as unavailable in this run.
attempts: ALIGNN CLI rejected or misrouted graphwise config
Direct graphwise loop failed with CPU-only DGL when moving graphs to CUDA
DGL 2.4.0+cu121 installed with --no-deps but hung during first forward pass
DGL 2.5.0+cu124 installed with --no-deps but also hung during first forward pass
